title: Forger

{{Quote|You were the executive officer of the Star Destroyer ''Forger'' when it suppressed a rebellion on Gra Ploven by creating steam clouds which boiled alive two hundred thousand Ploven in three coastal cities.|[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], to [[Davith Sconn]]|<ref name="SoL" />}}
'''''Forger''''' was a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. In the later stages of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], she served under the command of [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Dureya]], with [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Davith Sconn]] as her first officer.<ref name="SoL" />

In a notorious incident in around [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref>The date of the bombardment of Gra Ploven can be calculated from the fact that Sconn had spent twelve years in jail on [[Jagg Island]] as of [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]].</ref> Governor Dureya ordered ''Forger'' to subject the planet [[Gra Ploven]] to punitive bombardment, creating boiling clouds that killed 200,000 of the native [[Ploven]]. The Empire responded with judicial action, but they opted to punish Lieutenant Sconn for obeying his orders, rather than the Grand Moff for issuing them.<ref name="SoL" />
